data.title: Add system prompt customization UI
data.description:
**Labels:** `enhancement`, `frontend`, `backend`

**Description:**
Allow users to customize the system prompt from the UI instead of editing code.

**Proposed Solution:**
Add settings panel for system prompt configuration.

**Features:**

* Editable system prompt textarea
* Preset prompt templates (helpful assistant, code expert, etc.)
* Save custom prompts
* Reset to default
* Prompt preview/testing

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Settings UI for system prompt
- [ ] Prompt templates available
- [ ] Custom prompts saved in localStorage
- [ ] Backend accepts custom system prompts
- [ ] Character counter and validation

**Technical Considerations:**

* Add settings panel/modal
* Send custom prompt with requests
* Store presets in config
* Validate prompt length
* Optional: Prompt library/sharing

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Low-Medium** (settings UI, template system, storage)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Low** (straightforward UI and state management)
* 💎 Value: **Medium-High** (power users love this, enables customization without code changes)
